title: Legends of the Galaxy
description: Forge your own galactic legacy with an advanced Star Wars action-adventure modpack, and the official modpack for Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod!
body:
![](https://pswg.dev/img/cf/lotg_cf.png)

[Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod (PSWG)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pswg) is a brand-new take on the _Star Wars_+_Minecraft_ experience for Fabric and the latest _Minecraft_ versions. Actively in development, new content, features, and changes come each week, and we're working with other authors to further improve the experience. Stick with us as we continue adding content like new planets to explore, lightsabers and blasters to master, and locations to discover! Here are some of the mods the authors recommend to get the most out of your gameplay.

This modpack is a (currently) lightweight collection of various fabric performance improvements, vanilla utility improvement mods, and immersion mods adding more animations or ambience to the game. In the future, the pack will be further curated to better complement the core PSWG gameplay-loop.

PSWG is currently in alpha. [Check out the roadmap](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AA7JSn8eJkilxxEmRTSX06UnCAbHi3H0EMY759l-E5k/edit#heading=h.j8t2htnla1c) of content slated for the first full release, and feel free to [join our Discord](https://discord.pswg.dev) if you have any questions!

## Included Mods:

### _Galaxies_ family

*   [Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod (PSWG)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pswg)
*   [PSWG Clone Wars Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/pswg-addon-clonewars)
*   [Cresh: A Star Wars UI Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cresh)
    
### Performance
    
*   Sodium
*   Sodium Extras
*   Indium
*   Lithium

### Graphics

*   Iris
*   LambDynamicLights
*   Not Enough Animations
*   Falling Leaves

### Utility

*   Reese's Sodium Options
*   Appleskin
*   Roughly Enough Items
*   CameraUtils
*   FreeCam
*   WorldEdit
*   Presence Footsteps
*   Ambient Sounds

*   Xaero's World Map

### Library

*   Fabric API
*   Indium
*   Cloth Config
*   CreativeCore
*   Architectury

### Shaderpacks

*   BSL Shaders
*   Rethinking Voxels
*   Voyager Shader 2.0
